name: ai-assist
description: AI Think Tank — multi-model adversarial debate engine

scripts.build: npm run build-frontend && npm run build-server
scripts.build-server: tsc --outDir dist-server --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --skipLibCheck server.ts engine/index.ts engine/agents.ts engine/fileparser.ts engine/github.ts engine/providers.ts engine/roundtable.ts engine/router.ts engine/sandbox.ts engine/search.ts engine/types.ts 2>/dev/null || tsc -p tsconfig.server.json
